description:
Offered: Spring
This course examines the role of power, inequality, and culture in shaping environmental outcomes, and emphasizes the importance of environmental justice. It challenges students to reflect on the complacency of contemporary life and its environmental consequences.
Prerequisite(s): IDIS 1250 or SOC 1100 or permission from the instructor
Meets General Education Requirement(s): CV, DP
prerequisites: IDIS 1250 or SOC 1100 or permission from the instructor
